column1: # page-types.tsv — the page-type vocabulary for this KB (the `type:` frontmatter value).
# Edit to fit your domain. lint validates `type` against this list; `class` drives behavior:
#   content = needs ## Sources, prose is subject-only, carries a privilege tier
#   source  = a page whose subject IS a source (provenance is allowed in its prose)
#   nav     = catalog/home pages (index, overview); skipped when publishing
# Columns: type<TAB>class<TAB>dir<TAB>note     (dir = suggested subdir under wiki/)

column4: summary of one ingested source; provenance is its subject
a concrete thing the domain tracks (client, person, vendor, tool)
an idea, policy, or topic that spans sources
a durable synthesized answer across pages
the evolving top-level synthesis / home page
the content catalog of every page
